title: Michigan rolls to reach 1st Final Four since 2018
content: Yaxel Lendeborg scored 27 points, Elliot Cadeau had 10 assists and Michigan rolled into the Final Four, overwhelming Tennessee for a 95-62 victory in the NCAA tournament Sunday.

title: UConn women shed slow start, reach Final Four
content: No. 1 UConn grinded out a 70-52 victory against No. 6 seed Notre Dame to secure its 25th Final Four appearance and 17th in the past 18 tournaments.

title: GM: Garrett deal tweak not a precursor to trade
content: The modified language in Myles Garrett's contract is unrelated to a possible trade for the NFL's reigning Defensive Player of the Year, Browns general manager Andrew Berry said Sunday.

title: Lynch: 49ers' injury conspiracy 'big nothing burger'
content: Speaking Sunday afternoon at the NFL's annual meetings, 49ers GM John Lynch ruled out one conspiracy theory behind the team's avalanche of injuries in 2025.

title: Jets' Glenn: 'No doubt' that Smith is starting QB
content: Jets coach Aaron Glenn on Sunday became the first person from the organization to publicly declare Geno Smith as the starting quarterback, saying, "he's our guy."

title: Jays' Schneider finds letter, reassurance from Kerr
content: Blue Jays manager John Schneider received a handwritten letter from NBA coach Steve Kerr about how to deal with his World Series Game 7 heartbreak.

title: Former Vikings All-Pro safety Browner dies at 65
content: Joey Browner, the first defensive back selected by the Vikings in the first round and a member of the team's Ring of Honor, died Saturday at the age of 65.

title: 🏈 NFL draft: Predicting top WR prospects' stats
content: Which receivers in the 2026 draft class will have the most success in the pros? We have projections for the top prospects.

title: NBA playoff watch: With postseason teams set, seeding battles begin
content: Things are getting tight in the East. Plus, updated playoff projections, draft lottery standings after Saturday.

title: Peyton Manning: Pat Summitt changed my life
content: Legendary NFL quarterback Peyton Manning recounts a career-changing meeting with Pat Summitt that he credits for sparking a lifelong friendship.

title: Man United need to decide soon whether to back Carrick or hire someone else
content: Man United are approaching the point at which they need to decide: Is Michael Carrick our next permanent manager or not? Ian Darke unpacks their dilemma.

title: Time is running out for Foden to make England's World Cup squad
content: In less than 18 months, the Man City playmaker has gone from England mainstay to the fringe of the squad.

title: Forget luck: Kimi Antonelli shows he's an F1 title threat in Japan
content: Yes, the timing of a safety car helped Kimi Antonelli to Sunday's win at the Japanese GP, but he was still the fastest car on track when it happened.

title: WNBA's CBA: 10 biggest wins from new agreement
content: The CBA permanently and positively changes the WNBA's landscape. These are the wins, biggest strides and areas of compromise.

title: Tyrell Fortune: Living to fight another day after they pronounced me dead
content: Bellator heavyweight Tyrell Fortune recalls the weight cut that nearly took his life and left him with a new outlook.

title: Moses Itauma isn't the next heavyweight star, his era is already here
content: Moses Itauma's emphatic rise up the heavyweight pecking order continued on Saturday as the boxing world watched in awe at the 21-year-old's knockout over Jermaine Franklin Jr.

title: USMNT handed reality check by Doku, Belgium ahead of World Cup
content: Belgium provided a sobering assessment of where the USMNT currently stands, doling out a heavy 5-2 defeat that will leave Mauricio Pochettino with plenty to ponder.

title: Player ratings: Weah poor as USMNT suffer heavy Belgium defeat
content: It was a difficult game for the U.S. against Belgium, with Tim Weah struggling to make a positive impact.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Palmer ready to leave Chelsea for Man United?
content: Cole Palmer is becoming increasingly disillusioned at Chelsea and is ready to consider a move to Manchester United. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, tips, strategy, stats and more
content: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the fantasy baseball season.

title: 31 arrested for Ram Navami clashes in Bengal district
content: Police say 31 people have been arrested and 21 injured in the clashes; prohibitory orders have been imposed

title: People must protest against attack on Iran, India’s foreign policy: N. Ram
content: Mr. Ram said that the BJP government under Prime Minister Narendra Modi adopted a “shameful policy” after the “treacherous” attack on Iran by the United States and Israel

title: Curb unauthorised expenditure on projects, Railways directs officials
content: The Railway Board racks the whip after audit reports pointed to huge unsanctioned expenditure in the last 5 years

title: I am the candidate in all 294 seats in Bengal polls: Mamata
content: The Trinamool Congress chairperson urges the electorate to have faith in her; “forget who is your candidate, I am the candidate everywhere”

title: Maoist campaign saw continuity across regimes, sharper push recently: Former MHA official
content: He said that the years 2006-2009 were the most difficult, and the gradual gains made over the years found a resolute push in the past two-years when Home Minister Amit Shah set a deadline of March 31, 2026, to eradicate Left Wing Extremism from the country

title: Despite assurance from Centre, MGNREGS workers denied work
content: From Bihar to Rajasthan, thousands of rural workers say work has been halted; some district officials say they have been directed not to start new works as MGNREGA has been discontinued, though there are no such formal orders

title: T.N. Assembly election: Thirumavalavan to enter the fray in Kattumannarkovil
content: Party sources say though the decision came as a surprise, many felt that his presence in the Assembly and his contribution to Tamil Nadu’s political discourse will become important after the current Assembly election

title: Global acceptance of Pakistan a failure of Indian foreign policy: Jairam Ramesh
content: Congress leader says Pakistan’s improving global standing reflects failures in India’s diplomatic engagement

title: Mann ki Baat: Challenging times, says PM on West Asia crisis
content: Prime Minister Modi also talked about India’s various cricketing achievements in the recent past, and a number of initiatives being taken up across the country towards nation-building

title: BJP is the ‘A team’ of Kerala, says Modi at campaign meet
content: Positioning the BJP-led NDA as a decisive alternative, the Prime Minister said that an NDA government would advance the vision of a “Viksit Kerala”

title: In manifesto, DMK promises homemakers ₹8,000 coupon for buying home appliances of choice
content: Illatharasi scheme will allow homemakers to buy or replace household appliances. It will be the “heroine” of the 2026 election, says DMK president and Chief Minister M.K. Stalin. The manifesto also proposes to extend the Chief Minister’s Breakfast Scheme up to Class 8

title: WTO’s fisheries pact: India for 25 year transition period, stronger disciplines on distant-water industrial fishing
content: The Commerce Ministry said that fisheries subsidies were one of the key agenda items discussed by trade Ministers at the World Trade Organisation’s 14th Ministerial Conference (MC14) held from March 26–29 in Yaounde, Cameroon

title: TVK chief Vijay to make electoral debut from Perambur, Tiruchi East constituencies in Tamil Nadu Assembly election
content: TVK general secretary ‘Bussy’ N. Anand will contest from T. Nagar in Chennai, while K.A. Sengottaiyan will test the waters from his home turf, Gobichettipalayam. Aadhav Arjuna will contest from Villivakkam, K.G. Arunraaj from Tiruchengode and C.T.R. Nirmal Kumar from Thirupparankundram.

title: Tea body seeks clarity on Assam land transfer policy for plantation workers
content: Two months ahead of the elections, the BJP-led government amended a law to grant legal land rights to 3.5 lakh families of plantation workers living in the labour lines of more than 800 tea estates

title: Bengaluru metro ridership doubles as IPL ticket–metro integration draws over 22,000 commuters
content: According to a release by BMRCL, the move saw a sharp rise in ridership compared to the usual 8,000–10,000 commuters on match days, while also easing congestion and parking pressure in the central business district.

title: Vijay follows in the footseteps of Tamil Nadu politicians with a penchant for dual contests
content: TVK leader to contest two urban seats in debut election; precedent set by Jayalalithaa, who once contested four seats; PT, DMK, Congress leaders have also attempted dual contests, with less than stellar results

title: Per capita spending varies by 2.5 times across Bengaluru corporations: Report
content: The per capita outlay refers to the amount a corporation is spending on an individual in its jurisdiction

title: Bengaluru Metro services disrupted on Purple Line for maintenance
content: The temporary halt disrupted early morning commuters travelling along the busy Purple Line corridor, as the maintenance announcement came only on Sunday morning when the work began, leaving passengers with no time to alter their plans or arrange alternative modes of transport.

title: How close contests impacted victory margins in past Assembly elections in Tamil Nadu
content: An analysis of the results of Assembly elections in the State since 1967, shows there have been occasions where candidates lost by fewer than 25 votes

title: M.G. Ramachandran: Tamil Nadu’s charismatic leader who won his first and last elections from hospital bed
content: In 1977, MGR adopted a novel method of campaigning by sending out his life-size cut-outs in jeeps to far-flung villages in his rural Aruppukottai constituency in Ramanathapuram district.

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Poll promises may hit the coffers hard
content: While campaigning, LDF is highlighting welfare measures such as increased pensions and monthly wages implemented by the government. UDF has promised five basic ‘welfare guarantees,’ including raising welfare pensions to ₹3,000 if it comes to power. Experts question the rationale of such promises, given the huge cost involved in implementing and sustaining them

title: Promises delivered and undelivered during 5 years of DMK government
content: The govt. introduced schemes that did not figure in its manifesto, even while delivering key assurances such as Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thittam and free bus travel; but it has not formulated the Higher Education policy, set up Kalaignar Canteens or created special courts for corruption cases

title: ‘A double-engine govt. will de-risk people from  political conflicts that hurt their development’: Rajeev Chandrasekhar
content: If a State government has ‘24x7 animosity towards the Centre, the people will suffer’, says Kerala BJP president Rajeev Chandrasekhar; calling the party’s performance in the 2025 local body elections in the State a ‘big jump forward’, he slams ‘fake narratives’ against the BJP among minorities

title: Former AIADMK functionaries join TVK, fielded in Tirupattur and Cheyyar Assembly seats
content: The AIADMK leadership expelled Dusi K Mohan soon after his candidature was announced by actor C. Joseph Vijay

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Green Button campaign picks up pace in Kerala
content: Suchitwa Mission’s green election campaign, in association with the Election Commission of India, aims at reducing  waste generated during elections

title: Report highlights steps taken to mitigate risks posed by offshore Virtual Asset Service Providers
content: Listing the measures taken by India, the report said that the FIU has set up a dedicated Working Group with local VASPs and other stakeholders, such as banks, payment aggregators, and gateways, to formulate red flag indicators and develop strategies to detect and address operations of oVASPs serving Indian users

title: Hotels in rural areas of Shivamogga badly hit owing to disruption in supply of commercial LPG
content: Many small hotel owners, who usually earn few thousand rupees a day, have been forced to shut down their businesses, due to non-availability of LPG

title: Advanced equipment commissioned at Sri Sathya Sai hospital in Puttaparthi
content: The initiative is supported by the Life Insurance Corporation of India Golden Jubilee Foundation under its CSR programme

title: Global experts, IIT Delhi working on rehab and revival of Kaleshwaram Barrages
content: Minister for Irrigation N. Uttam Kumar Reddy announces taking up Pranahita-Chevalla project soon with Tummidihatti as source, completing in 3 years

title: T.N. Assembly election: TVK promises free education loans, unemployment allowance and incentives for firms that employ Tamil workers
content: Internship opportunities with stipend, schemes for entrepreneurs, and the establishment of a youth advisory council are among the other promises announced by TVK president C. Joseph Vijay before releasing the candidate list for the Assemble election in Chennai

title: Government to fill 8,000 vacant posts in Police Department this year: Siddaramaiah
content: Calling upon the police officials to serve the society with integrity and honesty, Mr Siddaramaiah said the officers need not worry about their family members while they are on duty.

title: Congress fuelled infiltration, changed Assam’s demography: Amit Shah
content: Addressing rallies for BJP candidates at Dhekiajuli and Tihu, the Home Minister sought another five years to drive the “resident” infiltrators out

title: India-US ties: Ambassador Gor outlines ‘win-win’ economic growth, highlights security cooperation as core strategic pillar
content: Gor argued that the U.S. is ‘uniquely positioned’ to serve as the ‘main facilitator’ of economic growth across Central and South Asian regions.

title: Rain disrupts life in three districts
content: In Shivamogga city, roads were flooded, causing hardship for motorists; power supply was also disrupted in many localities owing to the heavy showers

title: Christians celebrate Palm Sunday with processions and prayers in Vijayawada
content: The faithful walked in a procession carrying palm and coconut leaves, sang hymns expressing devotion and reverence

title: BJD MP quits House panel protesting disparaging remarks against Biju Patnaik
content: BJP MP and chairman of Parliamentary Standing Committee on IT and Communications Nishikant Dubey alleged that former Odisha Chief Minister Biju Patnaik worked as a “link” between Indian government and the CIA

title: Let us follow Lord Mahavira for lasting world peace, says Punjab Governor Gulab Chand Kataria
content: He was speaking after inaugurating a programme at Mahavira Bhavan on the occasion of Janma Kalyanaka, Lord Mahavira’s birth anniversary

title: Govt works for Indians' safety in Gulf, Congress risking lives: PM Modi
content: ​Launching the BJP-led NDA’s poll campaign at a rally in Kerala’s Palakkad, Modi said many people from the state are working in regions hit by the conflict and “for us their safety remains a top priority”. “Govt is working towards ensuring the crisis impact on India is minimal,” he said.

title: Bengal SIR: Portal for voter appeals live, but no word on offline route
content: Md Nazrul Islam, of Murshidabad, visited the DM’s office to enquire about what he should do. Md Jomadar Sheikh, of Dhulian, said a judicial tribunal was his only hope. Jahima Khatun’s name was deleted because her father’s name was misspelt in one document. EC released a fourth supplementary list Sunday with around two lakh names from among the close to 60 lakh that were under judicial adjudication. Of the 40 lakh cases disposed of by judicial officers, around 18 lakh have been rejected.

title: 3,000 less domestic flights to take to the skies this summer
content: While the airline projected getting a plane every week, the authorities asked the country’s largest carrier to file for flights when it gets more planes and can show it has the wherewithal, including pilot numbers, for the same. “We did not want a repeat of what happened last Dec and hence were extra cautious this time,” said a person in the know.

title: Nearly 3 lakh PNG connections added in March: Govt
content: Petroleum secretary Neeraj Mittal, in an online post, said that by giving up their LPG connections, people have helped those who don’t have access to gas cylinders. “Join this strong, bold group of do-good citizens who have come forward to give up LPG to help those get LPG who don’t have PNG,” he said on X.

title: Foreign brokerages cut India Inc’s earnings, index targets
content: Foreign broking major Goldman Sachs has cut the Nifty target to 25,900 points from 29,300 points earlier while Citigroup has revised down their target for the index to 27,000 points from 28,500 points earlier. On its part, HSBC said that historical trend shows that a 20% rise in oil price could drag down earnings of India Inc by 1.3 percentage points. Since the war started crude oil prices are up about 50-55%.

title: BJP drops 'Greater Kashmir' charge, backs J&K reorganisation bill
content: The proposal by PDP legislator Waheed Parra seeks 16 new districts across J&K and two additional divisions in Jammu. J&K currently has two divisions — Jammu and Kashmir — with 10 districts each. BJP said the bill should be tabled for debate, flagging objections only to names “Pir Panjal” and “Chenab Valley” for proposed Rajouri–Poonch and Doda–Kishtwar–Ramban divisions.

title: Google ex-CEO Eric Schmidt says coding is no longer a key skill
content: 0Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt says the best programmers no longer write code—they write specs, set evaluation criteria, and let AI work overnight. Schmidt described a startup programmer whose AI finishes by 4 AM what would have taken him six months and 10 engineers at Google. He argued top programmers will become more valuable, not less, and that AI's biggest impact will be automating costly corporate operations like billing, accounting, and logistics.

title: No jail term for farm goods, textiles export rule slip-ups
content: Similarly, failure to furnish information or sample, or furnishing false information or sample and damaging books of account or refusal to furnish it will not result in a jail term of up to three months, instead a fine of Rs 10,000-25,000 can be levied under the Handlooms (Reservation of Articles for Production) Act.

title: India accounts for 1 in 10 global maternal deaths: Lancet report
content: India’s long-term numbers reflect both progress and persistent gaps. Maternal deaths fell sharply from about 1.19 lakh in 1990 to 36,900 in 2015 and further to 24,700 in 2023. And the maternal mortality ratio declined from 508 in 1990 to 116 per one lakh live births in 2023, indicating substantial gains but also unfinished work.

title: OpenAI founder proposes to remove income tax on Americans earning less than $100k
content: Venture capitalist Vinod Khosla proposes eliminating federal income tax for Americans earning under $100,000, funded by higher capital gains taxes. He believes this addresses AI-driven job loss fears, a major concern for voters. Khosla also critiques current political approaches to AI, seeking a "surprise" presidential candidate focused on displaced worker security.

title: RBI’s forced dollar unwind to keep rupee from sliding, bruise banks
content: Until Friday, banks could run net open positions of up to 25% of their net worth. In practice, large lenders often accumulated sizeable long dollar bets, sometimes in excess of of $1 billion, on expectations of rupee depreciation. The new cap forces a rapid reversal. By April 10, 2026, banks must cut these exposures to $100 million. This compels them to sell dollars and buy rupees to close the gap.

title: Transport ministry proposes secured cover for moving dumpers, tippers
content: The draft notification also proposes that devices such as rear-view mirrors, indirect vision systems, guard rails, direction indicator rub-rails (rubber beading up to 20 mm on each side), side footsteps, and the load body enclosure system for tippers and dumpers should not be included while calculating the overall height. TOI on January 24 had reported about the govt’s move.

title: Wildlife actively use underpasses on Delhi-Doon economic corridor: Study
content: As per the recently published study by Dehradun-based Wildlife Institute of India, 150 camera traps (CTs) were systematically deployed along underpasses within a 3.5-km stretch — from Mohand village to Ganeshpur in Uttarakhand — and each unit was installed in a manner to ensure detection of a broad spectrum of terrestrial fauna, ranging from small to large-bodied species.

title: Baker Mayfield’s Bucs linked to $118M Commanders linebacker deal
content: Following Lavonte David’s retirement annoucement, The Athletic suggests the Tampa Bay Buccaneers target veteran linebacker Bobby Wagner to fill the legendary gap. Wagner is a Super Bowl champion with extensive accolades to his name. He has a high football IQ. He possesses elite run-stopping and pass-rushing abilities. This could potentially fit into Tampa Bay’s needs.

title: Antonio Brown sparks outrage with racist jab at Tiger Woods after DUI
content: Tiger Woods was arrested after a Florida car crash despite a 0.00 breathalyzer result, raising questions about impairment and legal consequences. The situation escalated when Antonio Brown posted, “Tiger Woods drives a car exactly how you would think a black Asian drives”, sparking backlash and shifting focus from concern to controversy online.

title: Hailee Steinfeld shares emotional note before first child with Josh Allen
content: Josh Allen and Hailee Steinfeld are nearing the arrival of their first child, adding a personal dimension to the quarterback’s upcoming season. Steinfeld’s recent newsletter offers a candid glimpse into her life, from honoring her mother to navigating late pregnancy moments. Alongside this, her film Sinners enjoyed award success, with Michael B. Jordan acknowledging her during his Oscar speech. Together, these moments reflect a transition period where career highlights and personal milestones are unfolding side by side.

title: India hosts key IONS maritime exercise in Kochi
content: As India assumes the IONS chairmanship for the 2026–2028 cycle after a gap of 16 years, IMEX TTX 2026 marks a key milestone in strengthening regional maritime leadership. Conducted in a sophisticated, simulated environment, the exercise addressed complex maritime security challenges in IOR, a region of critical importance to global trade, energy flows and connectivity.

title: 'Ask Cricket Australia': Rahane's blunt remark on Green stuns commentators
content: KKR went down by six wickets as Mumbai chased 221, with Rohit Sharma and Ryan Rickelton leading the effort.

title: IPL 2026: Rohit Sharma, Rickelton fire MI to record chase, ending 13-year jinx
content: Mumbai Indians shattered their opening match losing streak, chasing down KKR's 220 with a six-wicket victory. Rickelton and Rohit Sharma's explosive 148-run stand powered the chase. Despite KKR's strong batting performance, including fifties from Rahane and Raghuvanshi, MI's bowlers, led by Shardul Thakur, managed to restrict them. This win marks a significant start for MI in IPL 2026.

title: Rahul Arunoday Banerjee’s last video from set goes viral
content: A video of Bengali actor Rahul Arunoday Banerjee from the sets of his show Bholebaba Paar Karega is circulating on social media following news of his untimely death at 43. Rahul reportedly drowned at Talsari beach in Odisha during the shoot. The now-viral clip shows Rahul preparing for a shot with a female co-actor near a car, surrounded by a crowd of onlookers.

title: A shadow war? The Shia-Sunni equation behind Iran's Gulf attacks
content: For decades, West Asia had learned to live with tension. Proxy battles, covert strikes, deniable operations and quiet escalations had defined the region’s uneasy equilibrium. But what unfolded in recent weeks broke that pattern. Iran did not just respond to the joint strikes by the United States and Israel, it widened the battlefield. In doing so, it dragged the Gulf into a conflict many believed would remain contained between Tehran, Washington and Tel Aviv. The shock was not limited to the region.

title: Jinx broken: MI win IPL opener after 2012, Rohit Sharma leads chase vs KKR
content: Mumbai had not won their opening match of an IPL season since 2012, but they broke that run with a successful chase at home.

title: JEE Main session 2 admit card released for April exams: Check how to download
content: The National Testing Agency (NTA) has released the admit cards for JEE MAIN 2026 session 2 candidates appearing on April 02 and April 04, 2026. Available on the official NTA website, the hall tickets include Paper 1 (B.E./B. Tech) examination details and shifts. Candidates must ensure the QR code and barcode are visible and carry a valid photo ID. Admit cards for April 05–08 exams will be issued later. Helpline support is available for download issues.

title: Scott McLaughlin escapes huge IndyCar crash at 170mph in live race
content: Scott McLaughlin survived a massive crash during an IndyCar practice session at Barber Motorsports Park. His car hit the barrier at nearly 170mph and broke through fencing before stopping near trees. Safety teams acted quickly, and he walked away without serious injury. He later returned to qualify, finishing 14th, making it a shocking yet relieving day for everyone watching.

title: Rohit Sharma scripts history with 50th IPL fifty, joins Virat Kohli in elite list
content: Rohit Sharma's magnificent 78 off 39 balls powered Mumbai Indians' chase against KKR, marking his 50th IPL half-century. He partnered with Ryan Rickelton for a record 148-run opening stand, setting the tone for a strong pursuit of KKR's 221. Despite falling short of a century, Sharma's innings was crucial in keeping MI ahead of the required rate.

title: Middle East crisis: Mediators gather in Pakistan for talks on ending month-long Iran war
content: Top diplomats from Saudi Arabia, Turkey, and Egypt met in Pakistan over the weekend. They discussed ending the Middle East conflict. Fighting continued with US-Israeli strikes on Iran and Iranian missile and drone attacks. Iran rejected a US peace proposal. The conflict has caused over 3,000 deaths across the region. Diplomatic efforts continue despite ongoing hostilities.

title: IPL 2026: Rohit Sharma shell-shocked after dropping sitter off Raghuvanshi - Watch
content: Rohit Sharma dropped a crucial catch off Angkrish Raghuvanshi's bat during the Mumbai Indians vs. Kolkata Knight Riders IPL 2026 clash. The costly miss allowed Raghuvanshi to continue his impressive innings, contributing significantly to KKR's formidable total of 220. This fielding lapse, among others, highlighted MI's struggles as KKR dominated the match.

title: Bimal Oberoi jokes Aditya Dhar should be called ‘Aditya Dhurandhar’
content: Actor Bimal Oberoi, who plays Shirani in Aditya Dhar's 'Dhurandhar' films, shared his journey to bagging the pivotal role. He lauded director Aditya Dhar's exceptional craft and vision, comparing the film to industry benchmarks. Oberoi highlighted Dhar's ability to assemble a talented team and seamlessly integrate diverse musical elements, calling him a true 'Dhurandhar' director. Read on to know more in detail.

title: Dalal Street heads for holiday-shortened week amid Mahavir Jayanti, Good Friday
content: Indian stock markets face a shortened trading week with closures on Tuesday, March 31, for Mahavir Jayanti and Friday, April 3, for Good Friday. This marks the end of the financial year on a holiday. Commodity traders on MCX will have a partial opening on Mahavir Jayanti but will be fully closed on Good Friday.

title: KPMG UK puts nearly 600 audit jobs at risk as cost pressure deepens
content: KPMG UK is cutting nearly 600 roles in its audit division and around 120 in advisory, citing tougher market conditions and unusually low staff turnover. The proposed redundancies, potentially affecting up to 440 audit staff, aim to right-size operations. This move highlights broader cost-cutting pressures across professional services firms.

title: Watch: Pak dy PM falls on red carpet while welcoming Egyptian FM
content: Pakistan's Deputy Prime Minister Ishaq Dar stumbled on the red carpet while receiving Egypt's foreign minister in Islamabad. This occurred ahead of crucial de-escalation talks with Turkey and Saudi Arabia focused on reopening the Strait of Hormuz and restoring global shipping flows amid the Iran war.

title: Sunil Narine scripts history, etches name in IPL record books
content: Sunil Narine has set a new IPL record. He is now the overseas player with the most appearances in the tournament's history. Narine achieved this milestone in his 190th match for Kolkata Knight Riders. He surpassed Kieron Pollard's previous record. Narine has been a consistent performer for KKR since his debut in 2012.

title: CSK in trouble! After MS Dhoni injury, star player ruled out of IPL 2026 start
content: Chennai Super Kings face significant injury blows ahead of IPL 2026, with Dewald Brevis sidelined for the initial matches due to a side strain. This adds to the absence of MS Dhoni and Nathan Ellis, impacting the team's middle order and bowling attack. CSK will aim to overcome these setbacks as they begin their campaign against Rajasthan Royals.

title: UP Woman Who Eloped With Instagram Friend Returns After Children's Request
content: The incident took place in a village under Campierganj police station area, where the woman had left her husband and children around ten days ago to live with her 28-year-old lover from the Maniram area.

title: Mojtaba's New Message, Days After Trump's 'Don't Know If He's Alive' Claim
content: Iran's new supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei has in a written message thanked the people of Iraq for their support in the war against the United States and Israel, Iranian media said on Sunday.

title: India Faces Bottleneck In New Aircraft Procurement: Aviation Minister
content: Ram Mohan Naidu said Indian airline operators have placed large orders to meet rising demand, and around 30,000 pilots will be needed in the coming years to operate these aircraft.

title: Fire Rages As Shrapnel From Iran Missile Hits Industrial Facility In Israel
content: The industrial zone, located 12 kilometres from the city of Beersheba, is home to more than 40 factories.

title: 'Justice For Zubeen Garg In 100 Days': Congress' Poll Promise In Assam
content: Even as the countdown to the April 9 polls in Assam has begun, the main Opposition Congress on Wednesday released its Assembly election manifesto, announcing five key guarantees.

title: UP Man Beats Daughter, 12, To Death For Stealing Candy From Grocery Store
content: The man was enraged after a local shopkeeper complained to him that his daughter had stolen a packet of candy from his shop.

title: Delhi AIIMS Alumna Nisha Mehta Named Health Minister Of Nepal
content: Nisha Mehta was pursuing a degree in Bachelor of Science in Nursing at the institution from 2006 to 2010.

title: Beyond Jhiram Massacre: A Student's Memory Of A Teacher Who Never Returned
content: Quiet Aftershocks Of Jhiram Ghati Massacre - Part 2: For Dhan Singh, Sada Singh Nag was not a political worker, not a name in a convoy, but a teacher who taught them Halbi, the local dialect, and more.

title: Deadline To End Maoist Threat Near, But Fear Lingers In Bastar Massacre Site
content: The government's deadline for the complete eradication of Naxalism in the country, March 31, is at hand. But at Jhiram Valley in Chhattisgarh's Bastar, the nightmares have not stopped even 13 years after the massacre.

title: Iran Accuses US Of "Secretly" Plotting Ground Attack Despite Diplomatic Talk
content: The speaker of Iran's parliament accused the United States on Sunday of plotting a ground attack despite publicly pushing for a negotiated deal, after a US warship with around 3,500 military personnel arrived in the Middle East.

title: US Israel Iran War LIVE: Pakistan Holds Regional Meeting On Ending Iran War
content: US Israel Iran War News LIVE Updates: The United States and Israel continue to strike Iran, whose retaliatory attacks have targeted Israel and neighboring Gulf Arab states. More than 3,000 people have been killed.

title: Gaurav Gogoi As Chief Minister? Maybe In Pakistan: Himanta Sarma To NDTV
content: Asked about how much of a challenge the Opposition will pose, Sarma claimed the "game has slipped from their hands".

title: Congress Releases First List Of 284 Candidates For 2026 Bengal Polls
content: The announcement of candidates came a day after top Congress leaders held detailed deliberations on the list for the upcoming West Bengal assembly elections during the meeting of the Central Election Committee.

title: "Tea Tribes Have Waited Too Long For Justice": Hemant Soren At Assam Rally
content: The JMM has announced 21 candidates for the 126-member Assam Assembly elections scheduled for April 9.

title: Mumbai Set For Break In Heat As Light Rain, Thunderstorms Predicted
content: After days of relentless heat that saw the city grapple with sweltering conditions and multiple heatwave warnings, residents of Mumbai are likely to get some relief as the India Meteorological Department (IMD) forecasts a shift in weather in the comi

title: Rs 2,000 For Women, Rs 8,000 For Household Items: DMK's Tamil Nadu Manifesto
content: MK Stalin said the manifesto focuses on "smart economic multipliers," ensuring monetary support boosts local economies, supports small businesses, enhances skills, and drives long-term outcomes.

title: Airlines To Offer 60% Flight Seats Without Additional Charge From April 20
content: On March 18, the civil aviation ministry announced that directions have been issued to the DGCA to direct airlines to allocate a minimum of 60 per cent of seats for selection on any flight free of charge to ensure fair access for passengers.

title: What's next for Duke and Notre Dame after their Elite Eight exit?
content: all four no. 1 seeds advanced to the elite eight of the 2026 women's tournament . the offseason officially starts for some of them . here's your guide to their expected departures, returnees and top incoming recruits .

title: What's next for Tennessee after Elite Eight exit: Recruits, transfer portal, more
content: the 2026 men's tournament has featured its fair share of heartbreaking losses . storied programs didn't reach the regionals such as Kansas and North Carolina . title: NHL playoff watch: Updated East, West wild-card-race projections
content: in the east, the Boston Bruins and Columbus Blue Jackets hold the precious wild-card positions . they are trailed most closely by the Ottawa Senators and Detroit Red Wings . the Philadelphia Flyers are also in action Sunday (7 p.m. ET, ESPN+ ).

title: Follow live: Duke, UConn square off in marquee matchup
content: yaxel Lendeborg was the best player at the Midwest regional . he finished with 27 points, seven rebounds, four assists and no turnovers . it's time to decide whether Duke or UConn will join them in Indianapolis .

title: Cassidy out, Tortorella in for slumping Knights
content: the Vegas Golden Knights fired coach Bruce Cassidy on sunday . the move comes after a 5-4 defeat to the Washington Capitals on saturday night . he is the latest setback in a shootout to the san francisco capitals .

title: Why NBA insiders are all-in on the Spurs: 'Victor breaks all the rules'
content: the Oklahoma City Thunder ended their longest road trip of the season with a loss to the Boston Celtics . it was the Thunder's first loss in a month . the San Antonio Spurs are a remarkable 23-2 since Feb. 1 .
